name: tier1_sweep
description: Ablation of Tier 1 improvements: LoRA+, dropout, curriculum sampling. Baseline = uniform, no regularisation.

experiments.description: Standard LoRA — no Tier 1 changes. Reference point.
LoRA+ only: lr_B = 16 * lr_A. Should converge faster in early steps.
LoRA dropout 0.05 only. Light regularisation for 10-clip dataset.
LoRA dropout 0.1 only. Stronger regularisation — may prevent overfitting past step 2000.
Curriculum sampling only: logit_normal for steps 1-1200, then uniform. Should improve convergence vs pure uniform.
All Tier 1 combined: LoRA+ + dropout 0.05 + curriculum.
